name: Remove K Digits
description: Given string num representing a non-negative integer and an integer k, return the smallest possible integer after removing k digits from num. The result should not have leading zeros.
constraints: 1 <= k <= num.length <= 10^5. num consists of only digits. num does not have leading zeros except for zero itself.

performance.stress_intent: max-length numeric strings punish repeated deletions or slicing
